name: devhabits-root
description: Root configuration for running DevHabits frontend and backend simultaneously

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run cli:link
scripts.check: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
